title: Mizoram PSC Headmaster Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 21 Posts
short_info: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Headmaster Govt High School Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website of Mizoram PSC. A total of 21 vacancies have been announced through the Mizoram PSC Headmaster Govt High School Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Trained Graduate High School Teachers and trained Graduate High School Hindi Teachers with not less than 8 years regular service in the grade.
qualification.details: Trained Graduate High School Teachers and trained Graduate High School Hindi Teachers with not less than 8 years regular service in the grade.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Headmaster Govt High School Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
